sources.title: QLoRA: Efficient Finetuning of Quantized Language Models

sources_failed.title: OpenReview: Systematic Few-Shot vs Fine-Tuning Benchmark

result.summary: Research task failed due to inability to access key benchmark comparison papers behind conference paywalls. Retrieved partial data covers individual methods but lacks the systematic cross-method comparison needed for a complete methodology analysis.
key_findings: QLoRA enables fine-tuning of 65B parameter models on a single 48GB GPU with minimal quality loss compared to full fine-tuning
In-context learning performance is highly sensitive to example selection and ordering, with up to 30% accuracy variance based on prompt construction
